_comment: Sample MCP config for a llm-docker-integrated Python project. The 5 servers below give Claude/OpenCode eyes (playwright + chromium), filesystem read/write, git read-only, log tailing, and host-side job control via builder-api. Adjust paths / drop any server you don't want.
_playwright_note: Uses system chromium via --executable-path because Playwright's default chrome-for-testing channel has no Linux arm64 build. --no-sandbox is safe here because the llm-docker container is already cap_drop + no-new-privileges sandboxed.
_builder_api_note: BUILDER_API_PASSWORD is forwarded into the container by cld/ocd. The same value must match [defaults].password in ~/.llm-docker/builder-api.toml on the host.
